description.one_line: The citation-obsessed synthesizer who never speaks without a source.

usage_guidance.when_to_use: Real-time news/facts research, verifying claims with citations, current event analysis.
usage_guidance.when_not_to_use: Private data analysis or tasks where the web is irrelevant.
